revision.change_summary: Migrated shared MQB programming procedure to revisioned compatibility and workshop verification structure

spare_key.method: OBD where supported by the exact cluster, immobiliser and tool combination
spare_key.notes: Verify exact model year, cluster family, key type and current tool coverage before starting. Keep all available keys present.

add_key.notes: Some procedures relearn every key. Do not begin unless all required keys and regulated battery support are available.

all_keys_lost.method: Tool-specific sync-data, cluster, immobiliser or module-read procedure may be required
all_keys_lost.notes: Never infer universal AKL support from another MQB vehicle. Confirm exact cluster, immobiliser generation, key type, adapters and software version.

remote_programming.method: Usually integrated with immobiliser key learning when supported
remote_programming.notes: Verify remote frequency, button layout and part compatibility separately from transponder learning.

exclusions.condition: MQB A0, MQB Evo, IMMO5C, IMMO5D or other later security variant confirmed
exclusions.action: Use a more specific procedure component

conditions: Exact support depends on model, year, cluster, immobiliser generation, key system, tool and software version
Related-platform workshop evidence is advisory and is not exact-vehicle verification
Battery support is required for safe professional workflow
